name: claude-harness-forge
description: GAN-inspired autonomous SDLC scaffold (BRD v3.0): initializer/coding-agent split, feature_list.json contract, mandatory browser-automation E2E gate, Ralph Loop exit interception, per-workflow LLM routing, Plan Mode subagent, Extended ReAct, adaptive context compaction, tree-structured sessions, spec-gap backprop, monotonic-improvement guards, instinct extraction, YAML recipes. Vendor-first reuse mandate per brd/v3.0.md §10.

playwright.purpose: BRD §3.8 E2E gate — browser automation for verification artifacts under verification/<feature_id>.{png,json}. Required before any feature_list.json passes:false→true flip; the e2e-gate hook rejects flips with no committed artifact.

alternatives.name: puppeteer
alternatives.rationale: Equivalent to Playwright; use when the target project's stack favors Puppeteer.
